name: Drizzle Bars Made with Failed Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Melt butter and blend with sugar and flour until cohesive.
3. Press mixture into an ungreased pan (8x8 or 9x9).
4. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes.
5. Spread shredded sweetened coconut over the hot crust.
6. Top with candy chips of your choice.
7. Pour failed fudge over the chips and chop too-hard or grainy pieces over the chips.
8. Scatter walnuts over the top.
9. Drizzle sweetened condensed milk over everything.
10. Use a spatula to press down and compact the bars.
11. Finish baking for 15 to 20 minutes.
12. Cool on a rack and cut into bars.
Yield: Approximately 2 1/2 dozen 2x2-inch bars.
